claim: Voice UI is emerging as distinct interface category; foundational stack (speech-to-text, LLM, text-to-speech) hides real complexity: VAD, prosody, endpointing, turn detection
actionable: Don't underestimate voice UI complexity; use managed platforms for VAD, endpointing, and barge-in handling rather than building from STT+TTS
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Ashwyn Sharma: Every App Needs a Voice UI. Here's How to Build It

claim: Voice agents embedded in applications need bidirectional communication: on_action hook listens to agent directives, send_action pushes app state back to agent
actionable: Use declarative JSON for client actions; implement bidirectional hooks for agent-app communication; don't cascade speech-to-text->LLM->text-to-speech
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Ashwyn Sharma: Every App Needs a Voice UI. Here's How to Build It

claim: Voice agents should have their own brain for small talk, not delegate everything to LLM; separates conversation management from task reasoning
actionable: Build voice agent with independent small-talk capability; delegate only substantive queries to backend LLM; reduce context window load on main agent
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Ashwyn Sharma: Every App Needs a Voice UI. Here's How to Build It

claim: Voice UI allows agents to decide when to switch modality based on task; brainstorming easier via voice (lowers cognitive load), then switch to text
actionable: Enable agents to use voice as tool; let agents choose when voice vs text is optimal; implement seamless modality switching
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Ashwyn Sharma: Every App Needs a Voice UI. Here's How to Build It

claim: Voice agents can use standard LLM tool schema for function calling; phone call tool enables agents to handle complex outbound communication autonomously
actionable: Use voice as tool via standard tool schema; implement compliance checks for outbound voice automation (terms of service, disclosures)
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Ashwyn Sharma: Every App Needs a Voice UI. Here's How to Build It

claim: Every interface and agent will eventually have voice surface; just as mobile became standard for web apps, voice will become standard for AI agents
actionable: Plan voice support for all agent products; don't treat voice as optional add-on; design for voice-first where appropriate
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Ashwyn Sharma: Every App Needs a Voice UI. Here's How to Build It
